# tenzir_organization_member (Resource)

A user's membership in an organization. Requires org-admin credentials. The platform enforces that a user belongs to at most one organization, and rejects removing the last member or demoting or removing the last admin.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `organization_id` (String) Identifier of the organization.
- `user_id` (String) Identifier of the user, as issued by the platform's identity provider (e.g. the OIDC `sub` claim).

### Optional

- `role` (String) Organization role of the member, `member` or `admin`. Defaults to `member`. Changed in place.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Identifier of the membership; identical to `user_id`, since members are addressed by their user id.
